title: Thorgeld I
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Thorgeld-TEA.jpg]] |name=Thorgeld I |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Thorgeld system/Legends|Thorgeld system]] *[[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] |sector= |system=[[Thorgeld system/Legends|Thorgeld system]] |coordinates=L-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position=1''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Mandel family mansion]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Fabrin (city)|Fabrin]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|''Assessor'', this is ''Dorion Discus''. Ah, negative on customs inspection. We have a priority cargo for the Imperial base on Markon IV. Our priority authorization is filed on Thorgeld.|Roark Garnet attempts to bluff the Imperial Customs Frigate ''Assessor''|}} '''Thorgeld I''', also known as '''Thorgeld''', was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The [[Mandel family mansion|mansion]] of [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech, Inc.]] head [[Kvarn Mandel]] and [[Mandel family|his family]] was located on the planet, in the underground [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Fabrin (city)|Fabrin]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the crew of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Dorion Discus]]'' visited Thorgeld I. Shortly after the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] left the planet, the [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] [[Assessor (Imperial Customs Frigate)|''Assessor'']] attempted to board the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] for a [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|customs]] [[Customs Inspector|inspection]], but the ''Dorion Discus'' eventually escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ==Description== Thorgeld I, also known simply as Thorgeld, was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the first [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in the [[Thorgeld system/Legends|Thorgeld system]], a part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. ==History== {{Quote|I.N.S. ''Assessor'', calling stock light freighter. Identify yourself, please.''"
"''Ah, ''Assessor'', this is the freighter ''Dorion Discus''.''"
"''Stand by, ''Dorion Discus''. Prepare for customs inspection.|Roark Garnet responds to the Imperial Customs Frigate ''Assessor'' hailing the ''Dorion Discus'' over Thorgeld I|}} At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the crew of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Dorion Discus]]''—which included the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]]; the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tantos Dree]]; the retired [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Jackson Farseeker]]; and Farseeker's [[Gender/Legends|granddaughter]] and Garnet's daughter, [[Jill Farseeker|Jill]]—visited Thorgeld I. Shortly after leaving the planet, the ''Dorion Discus'' was confronted by the [[Imperial Customs Frigate]] [[Assessor (Imperial Customs Frigate)|''Assessor'']], which ordered Garnet's [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] to stand by for [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|customs]] [[Customs Inspector|inspection]] boarding. Hoping to stall for [[Time/Legends|time]] before executing a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump out of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Garnet contacted the ''Assessor'' and claimed that the ''Dorion Discus'' could not be boarded. The smuggler further bluffed that his [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was carrying important cargo for the [[Unidentified Imperial base (Markon IV)|Imperial base]] on the celestial body [[Markon IV]] and that priority authorization for the shipment had been filed on Thorgeld I. However, the crew of the ''Assessor'' did not fall for Garnet's attempt at bluff and fired a warning shot at his ship in response. Eventually, the ''Dorion Discus'' engaged the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in [[Space warfare/Legends|combat]] above Thorgeld I before finally escaping to hyperspace. ==Locations== [[Fabrin (city)|Fabrin]] was an underground [[City/Legends|city]] on Thorgeld I that featured a maze of corridors. The [[Mandel family mansion|mansion]] of [[Kvarn Mandel]], the head of [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech, Inc.]], and [[Mandel family|his family]] was located in the corridors of Fabrin during the time between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Despite regularly traveling to his company's [[Sector/Legends|sector]] headquarters, Mandel returned home on Thorgeld I at least once a [[Standard month/Legends|month]]. ==Behind the scenes== The planet Thorgeld was first mentioned in the [[1987]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|rulebook]] for the first edition of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] ''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'' sourcebook written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]], provided the planet's full name. In [[2009]], the reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Thorgeld system, and therefore Thorgeld I, in grid square L-9. ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Thorgeld I}} *[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] {{1stm}} *''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' {{1stID|Thorgeld I}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Planets in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Planets in the Northern Dependencies]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
